svg.title: Sliding window trace over array [1, 2, 3, 2, 3, 3] using a hashset to detect duplicates
svg.desc: Five snapshots of a sliding-window scan looking for the longest substring without repeats. Pointers L and R bound the current window, shown in red, with a hashset tracking the unique values inside it written as a simple curly-brace set. When R reaches a duplicate, L advances past the earlier copy, shrinking the window until it's valid again.
svg.text: * The elements in red represent the current window
